title: PACT Heartbeat Response
description: Response body for POST /api/pact/{fabricId}/_heartbeat. Returns the fabric's liveness view so the caller's reasoning context learns whether counterparties are present. Added in PACT v2.0.3 (§4.4.3).

server_received_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the server recorded the heartbeat.

latest_event_id.description: Most recent event in the fabric at the time of the heartbeat.

caller_last_seen.description: The caller's last_seen as recorded by this heartbeat (typically equal to server_received_at).

members_liveness.description: Per-member liveness view, filtered by §17.13 disclosure rules. Coarse-grained timestamps RECOMMENDED.

pending_obligation_count.description: Number of currently pending obligations targeting the caller.

drift_warning.description: Optional advisory. Set when client_observed_event_id is materially behind latest_event_id. Free-form text, e.g. 'caller is 12 events behind'.
